subcodes.first_line: O Mahdi! These are grievous days, wherein all exalted spirits are in trepidation and perturbation [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای مهدی این ایام ایام شداد است که جمیع ارواح عالین در تزلزل و اضطراب تا که را
subcodes.subjects: @corruption; misinterpretation of the Word of God, @call to action, @bringing oneself to account each day, @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life, @justice and wrath of God, @spiritual transformation, @suffering and imprisonment, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @love, unity, and fellowship among the friends; in the Cause
